dailyNews.title: NYC High School Student Freed After 10 Months in ICE Detention
dailyNews.description: The arrest of Dylan Lopez Contreras last year was the first reported case of a public school student in the city being taken by federal immigration agents since President Trump returned to office.

dailyNews.title: Firm That Planned Trump’s Jan. 6 Rally Received No-Bid Contracts
dailyNews.description: This administration has given the company, staffed by the president’s allies, multimillion-dollar contracts it was guaranteed to win.

dailyNews.title: Stratton, Illinois Senate Primary Winner, Promises a ‘Fight’ With Trump
dailyNews.description: Ms. Stratton, a Democrat whose viral campaign ad featured voters’ profane views of Mr. Trump, said her campaign’s aggressive messaging was resonating.

dailyNews.title: Silicon Valley Musters Behind-the-Scenes Support for Anthropic
dailyNews.description: Tech companies have been reluctant to directly confront Trump administration officials over their contract feud with the A.I. start-up.

dailyNews.title: Iran lashes out with missiles as Israel says war still intensifying
dailyNews.description: Iran retaliates for Israel's latest assassinations as President Trump and Israeli leader Benjamin Netanyahu give no indication the war is about to let up, 19 days in.

dailyNews.title: Top Trump counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's director of the National Counterterrorism Center, Joe Kent, announced his immediate resignation Tuesday, citing the administration's decision to intervene in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump hasn't decided on sending Americans after Iran's nuclear material, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon has prepared multiple options for President Trump as potential next steps in the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump hasn't decided on sending troops into Iran to seize nuclear material, sources say
dailyNews.description: President Trump hasn't made up his mind yet on sending U.S. troops to Iran to seize the country's nuclear material, sources tell CBS News. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe reports.

dailyNews.title: Top intelligence officials' testimonies raise concerns over Trump's justification for Iran war
dailyNews.description: Top U.S. intelligence officials testified before the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence about worldwide threats. Senators pressed Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard about intelligence assessment and what was shared with President Trump before U.S.-Israeli conducted strikes against Iran. CBS News' Taurean Small has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump sends new message to NATO allies over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump once again disparaged NATO allies over their response to his demands for help with reopening the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Watch: King presses Ratcliffe, Gabbard about briefing Trump about Iran ahead of strikes
dailyNews.description: Sen. Angus King of Maine questioned CIA Director John Ratcliffe and Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard about briefing President Trump about intelligence on Iran in the days and weeks leading up to Operation Epic Fury. King pointed out discrepancies between the intelligence agency's assessment and what Mr. Trump has said publicly.
